prompt: Search X (2025-2026) for AI startup founders/engineers saying enterprise SECURITY REVIEWS, vendor security questionnaires, or SOC2 requirements are BLOCKING or DELAYING their deals. Quote specific posts verbatim with handles + dates. How acute and how common is this pain? Cite.

Search X for signals of WILLINGNESS TO PAY: AI founders paying for (or wishing they could buy) help to pass enterprise security reviews faster, get SOC2 quickly, or produce a security/trust attestation. What do they pay, what do they use, what's missing? Quote posts + handles. Cite.

Search X + web for the pain of filling out enterprise VENDOR SECURITY QUESTIONNAIRES (SIG, CAIQ, custom) as an AI/SaaS startup in 2026 — time cost, repetition, AI-specific questions enterprises now add. Quote founder posts. Cite.

Search X for 2026 reactions to AI AGENT SECURITY incidents/breaches (e.g., Mercor April 2026, prompt-injection, over-permissioned agents, MCP risks). What are founders/security people saying, and does it create buying urgency for agent-security proof? Quote posts + handles. Cite.

Search X for founder/practitioner sentiment about Vanta, Drata, Secureframe, SafeBase, Whistic, Conveyor, Vorlon, Lakera, Prompt Security in 2026 — what people love, hate, find missing, especially re: AI-AGENT-specific security/attestation. Quote posts. Cite.

Search X for 'someone should build' / 'why is there no' / 'I'd pay for' posts in 2026 related to AI security, agent security, compliance, trust attestation, or passing security reviews. Quote verbatim with handles. Cite.

Search X for NAMED seed/Series-A AI-native startups in 2026 that sell agentic products to enterprises and have publicly discussed security/compliance/security-review friction. Who are they, what do they sell, what did they say? This profiles the actual ICP. Cite.

Search X for 2026 founder/operator chatter on EU AI Act (Aug 2 enforcement), Colorado AI Act (June), and SOC2/ISO42001 for AI — is it creating real, time-boxed urgency and budget, or is it being ignored? Quote posts + handles. Cite.

Search X + web for HOW seed/Series-A AI founders discover and buy security/compliance tools and services in 2026 — channels, communities, who they trust, accelerator influence, peer referrals, contingency/fast-pilot norms. Cite.

Search X + web: would an enterprise security reviewer actually ACCEPT a third-party 'AI agent security attestation' from a small vendor? What gives such an attestation credibility (signatures, standards mapping, named auditor, transparency log)? What would make buyers distrust it? Cite.

Search X + web for 2026 pricing norms: what do AI startups pay for SOC2 automation (Vanta/Drata), pen-tests, security audits, and fractional security/compliance help? What price would be a no-brainer to unblock a stalled enterprise deal? Cite.

Search X + web for the NEWEST 2026 entrants (last 90 days) in AI-agent security, AI trust/attestation, and compliance-for-AI — who just launched or raised, and could fast-follow an 'agent security review readiness attestation' product? Cite.
